Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.chat

Class YouTubeLiveChat

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.chat.YouTubeLiveChat
public class YouTubeLiveChat extends Object

    Pins the target chat item to the top of chat.

    Reset this.
    void
    sendMessage(String message)
    Send a message to this live chat You need to set user data using setUserData() before calling this method

    Language used to get chat Default locale is Locale.US(en_US) setLocale(Locale.US);

    Set user data.

    Set user data.

  • Constructor Details

    • YouTubeLiveChat

      public YouTubeLiveChat(String id, boolean isTopChatOnly, IdType type) throws IOException
      Initialize YouTubeLiveChat
      Parameters:
      id - Id used in YouTube
      isTopChatOnly - Is this top chat only mode
      type - The type of id (VIDEO or CHANNEL)
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalArgumentException - Video id is incorrect

    • YouTubeLiveChat

      public YouTubeLiveChat(String videoId, boolean isTopChatOnly) throws IOException
      Initialize YouTubeLiveChat using video id
      Parameters:
      videoId - Video id used in YouTube
      isTopChatOnly - Is this top chat only mode
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalArgumentException - Video id is incorrect

    • YouTubeLiveChat

      public YouTubeLiveChat(String videoId) throws IOException
      Initialize YouTubeLiveChat using video id. This works with top chat only mode.
      Parameters:
      videoId - Video id used in YouTube
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalArgumentException - Video id is incorrect

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset() throws IOException
      Reset this. If you have an error, try to call this. You don't need to call setLocale() again.
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error

    • update

      public void update() throws IOException
      Update chat data
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error

    • update

      public void update(long offsetInMs) throws IOException
      Update chat data with offset
      Parameters:
      offsetInMs - Offset in milli seconds
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage(String message) throws IOException, IllegalStateException
      Send a message to this live chat You need to set user data using setUserData() before calling this method
      Parameters:
      message - Chat message to send
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalStateException - The IDs are not set error

    • banUserPermanently

      public void banUserPermanently(ChatItem chatItem) throws IOException, IllegalStateException
      Permanently bans the author of the target chat item.
      Parameters:
      chatItem - target chat item
      Throws:
      IOException - if the moderation request fails
      IllegalStateException - if permissions or user data are missing

    • unbanUser

      public void unbanUser(ChatItem chatItem) throws IOException, IllegalStateException
      Removes a permanent ban for the author of the target chat item.
      Parameters:
      chatItem - target chat item
      Throws:
      IOException - if the moderation request fails
      IllegalStateException - if permissions or user data are missing

    • pinMessage

      public void pinMessage(ChatItem chatItem) throws IOException, IllegalStateException
      Pins the target chat item to the top of chat.
      Parameters:
      chatItem - target chat item
      Throws:
      IOException - if the action request fails
      IllegalStateException - if permissions or user data are missing

    • setLocale

      public void setLocale(Locale locale)
      Language used to get chat Default locale is Locale.US(en_US) setLocale(Locale.US);
      Parameters:
      locale - Language (country code and language code are required)

    • setUserData

      public void setUserData(Map<String,String> cookie) throws IOException
      Set user data. Cookies can be found in Chrome Devtools(F12) 'Network' tab, 'get_live_chat' request. You need all cookies.
      Parameters:
      cookie - Cookie
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error

    • setUserData

      public void setUserData(String cookie) throws IOException
      Set user data. Cookies can be found in Chrome Devtools(F12) 'Network' tab, 'get_live_chat' request. You need all cookies.
      Parameters:
      cookie - Cookie
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error

    • getVideoId

      public String getVideoId()
      Get video id
      Returns:
      Video id

    • getChannelId

      public String getChannelId()
      Get channel id of this live.
      Returns:
      Channel id

    • getRecommendedIntervalMs

      public long getRecommendedIntervalMs()
      Returns the polling interval suggested by YouTube, in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      recommended polling interval in milliseconds

    • isLiveEnded

      public boolean isLiveEnded()
      Returns whether the live broadcast appears to have ended.
      Returns:
      true if ended, otherwise false

    • isReplay

      public boolean isReplay()
      Check this live replay is replay.
      Returns:
      If this live is replay, returns true.

    • getBannerItem

      public ChatItem getBannerItem()
      Get pinned message
      Returns:
      ChatItem

    • getChatItems

      public ArrayList<ChatItem> getChatItems()
      Get list of ChatItem
      Returns:
      List of ChatItem

    • getChatItemDeletes

      public ArrayList<ChatItemDelete> getChatItemDeletes()
      Get list of ChatItemDelete
      Returns:
      List of ChatItemDelete

    • getChatTickerPaidMessages

      public ArrayList<ChatItem> getChatTickerPaidMessages()
      Get list of ChatItem(type=TICKER_PAID_MESSAGE)
      Returns:
      List of ChatItem

    • getContextMenu

      public void getContextMenu(ChatItem chatItem)
      Loads moderation context-menu actions for a chat item.
      Parameters:
      chatItem - the target chat item

    • getVideoIdFromURL

      public static String getVideoIdFromURL(String url)
      Get video id from url
      Parameters:
      url - Full url(example https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Aw5b1sa0w)
      Returns:
      Video id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - URL format is incorrect

    • getChannelIdFromURL

      public static String getChannelIdFromURL(String url)
      Get channel id from url
      Parameters:
      url - Full url(example https://www.youtube.com/channel/USWmbkAWEKOG43WAnbw)
      Returns:
      Channel id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - URL format is incorrect

    • getBroadcastInfo

      public LiveBroadcastDetails getBroadcastInfo() throws IOException
      Get broadcast info
      Returns:
      LiveBroadcastDetails obj
      Throws:
      IOException - Couldn't get broadcast info
